wash_trade_concerns: ORDI trading volume on centralized exchanges (primarily Binance and OKX) has historically shown signs of inflated activity during inscription hype cycles in 2023-2024; current organic demand signals are difficult to verify without paid on-chain tooling, but CoinGecko's trust score for top ORDI markets is moderate, suggesting some concern remains.
rationale: ORDI is a BRC-20 token on Bitcoin, meaning granular on-chain metrics (DAU, wallet cohorts, exchange flow USD values) are not freely surfaced by standard EVM explorers or DefiLlama, which does not track BRC-20 TVL for ORDI specifically. CoinGecko (coingecko.com/en/coins/ordi) shows ORDI trading near $5.50–$6.50 range as of mid-July 2025, down sharply from its all-time high of ~$96 in December 2023. Coinglass public pages do not provide ORDI-specific exchange net-flow USD breakdowns on the free tier. Dune Analytics has community dashboards for BRC-20 activity (e.g., dune.com/dgtl_assets/bitcoin-ordinals) but granular ORDI-specific DAU and cohort data require queries that are either paywalled or not maintained with current data as of this date.
